results.title: 'Mecha Chameleon,' the Hide-and-Seek Game with a Splash of Color, Hits 15 Million Units Sold
results.description: ©INVENMecha Chameleon has sold a staggering 15 million units in less than a month since its release.Mecha Chameleon is a hide-and-seek game created by Japanese solo developer Remorion_1224 in collaboration with artist Haganeiro....
